reference: I have back pain across the waist area of my back. I have had a fever and chills with this. I also have soreness in my left chest, shoulders, arms, and legs. My legs did not want to move like they normally do. It is hard to climb steps, and I can hardly get in and out of the car since this has happened.
text: I have back pain across the waist area of my back. I have had a fever and chills with this. I also have soreness in my left chest, shoulders, arms, and legs. My legs did not want to move like they normally do. It is hard to climb steps, and I can hardly get in and out of the car since this has happened.
